## What does this PR do?

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (criterion / collector / adapter / capability)
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests (`tests/`) covering the change
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] Updated `config/framework.yaml` and `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] No layer aborts the run on failure (graceful degradation preserved)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention (e.g. scoring/gate changes, new criterion ids).
